reference: My wife has had pain on her right side below the ribcage for two weeks. It is a constant sharp pain. The emergency room physician said her blood work was good and her ultrasound for the gallbladder was fine. Yet it is still there. I can squeeze her side and feel that it is a small spherical structure that is movable freely. She is an African American female, forty-six years of age, weighing three hundred and twenty-five pounds. Please advise on what this may be.
text: my wife has had pain on her right side below the rib cage for two weeks it is a constant sharp pain the emergency room physician said her blood work was good and her ultrasound for the gallbladder was fine yet it is still there i can squeeze her side and feel that it is a small spherical structure that is movable freely she is an african-american female 46 years of age weighing 325 pounds please advise on what this may be
